feed.title: Zosia Marciniak
feed.subtitle: Master Student of Industrial Design at KAIST

entry.title: Future Blog Post
entry.content: This post will show up by default. To disable scheduling of future posts, edit config.yml and set future: false.
entry.summary: This post will show up by default. To disable scheduling of future posts, edit config.yml and set future: false.

entry.title: Presented StitchFlow at UIST 2025 in Busan

link.title: Presented StitchFlow at UIST 2025 in Busan

entry.content: Presented my first first author paper and my master thesis, StitchFlow, at UIST in Busan, South Korea!
entry.summary: Presented my first first author paper and my master thesis, StitchFlow, at UIST in Busan, South Korea!

entry.title: Became an Engineer at Samsung Electronics

link.title: Became an Engineer at Samsung Electronics

entry.content: Oficially started as an Engineer at Samsung Electronics!
entry.summary: Oficially started as an Engineer at Samsung Electronics!
